sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SkyWest, Inc. (NASDAQ:SKYW) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: SkyWest, Inc. reported Q1 2026 net income of $102 million, or $2.50 per diluted share, surpassing expectations. The company highlighted increased production, fleet utilization, and strategic initiatives, including the launch of the CRJ450 with United and ongoing E175 deliveries. SkyWest aims for continued profitability in 2026, driven by fleet flexibility, debt reduction, and a strong balance sheet despite anticipated elevated fuel costs.

feed.title: Sandisk upgraded at GF Securities with $1,277 price target (SNDK:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: GF Securities upgraded Sandisk (SNDK) to Buy with a $1,277 price target, leading to a 2.6% rise in shares during premarket trading. The upgrade comes ahead of Sandisk's expected FY3Q26 revenue report on April 30.

feed.title: Sunlands posts 2025 SEC filing, offers audited report on request
feed.summary: Sunlands Technology Group (NYSE: STG) has filed its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with the U.S. SEC on April 24, 2026. The report and audited financial statements are accessible on the company's investor relations website and the SEC's website. Shareholders and ADS holders can request a free hard copy of the annual report by contacting sl-ir@sunlands.com.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:PFG) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.82
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (NASDAQ:PFG) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.82 per share, representing a 2.5% increase from its previous dividend. Shareholders of record on June 1st will receive the payment on June 26th. The company maintains a conservative payout ratio, with analysts expecting future earnings to comfortably cover the increased dividend.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.26
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.26 per share, payable on June 22nd to shareholders of record on May 27th. The basic materials company reported strong first-quarter earnings, beating analyst estimates with $2.90 EPS on revenues of $7.31 billion, a 45.8% increase year-over-year. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating on NEM, with a consensus price target of $139.81.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies Inc Declares Quarterly Dividend of $1.25 (NYSE:LHX)
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies Inc (NYSE:LHX) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.25 per share, payable on June 26th to shareholders of record on June 5th. This represents an annualized dividend yield of 1.5%. The company has consistently increased its dividend for 24 consecutive years, with a payout ratio indicating strong coverage by earnings.

feed.title: Domino's Pizza Stock Could Be Cheap Ahead of Earnings Next Week
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) stock appears undervalued ahead of its Q1 earnings release on April 27th, driven by its strong free cash flow. The company's free cash flow margin in 2025 was 13.6%, and if Q1's margin remains robust, analysts may increase their price targets, potentially valuing the stock at $434.84. Investors can also consider selling out-of-the-money put options as a strategy to capitalize on this potential undervaluation.

feed.title: Seasonal Improvements Lowered Mortgage Delinquencies in March While Prepayment Activity Reached Nearly Four-Year High
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE: ICE) reported that mortgage delinquencies saw seasonal improvements in March 2026, with the national delinquency rate falling and prepayment activity reaching a nearly four-year high. Despite these positive trends, serious delinquencies and foreclosure inventories continued to rise, with 154,000 more borrowers 90-plus days past due or in active foreclosure compared to the previous year, and foreclosure inventory hitting a six-year high. Andy Walden, head of mortgage and housing market research at ICE, noted that while overall performance remains healthy for most, the increasing late-stage delinquencies and foreclosure pipelines warrant continued monitoring.

feed.title: Wealth Science Advisors LLC Makes New $3.56 Million Investment in Equifax, Inc. $EFX
feed.summary: Wealth Science Advisors LLC has initiated a new position in Equifax, acquiring 16,400 shares valued at approximately $3.56 million, making it their 10th-largest holding. This investment comes despite recent insider selling by Equifax's CEO and EVP, totaling around $9.96 million in the last 90 days. Equifax recently reported strong Q1 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and has a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with a price target of $231.

feed.title: Big Food Companies Revamp to Keep Up With Newcomers
feed.summary: Big food companies like PepsiCo and Kraft Heinz are undergoing significant changes to adapt to evolving consumer tastes and compete with newer market entrants. The food industry is described as chaotic for companies but offers a wide variety for consumers. This article, part of Bloomberg's Retail Monitor, provides insights into these industry trends.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $2.00
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) has declared a quarterly dividend of $2.00 per share, an 11.1% increase from its previous dividend. The industrial products company, which has raised its dividend for 70 consecutive years, will distribute the dividend on June 5th to shareholders of record by May 8th. Analysts expect the company to continue covering its dividend with a future payout ratio of 21.1%.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ:JBHT) Announces $0.45 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ:JBHT) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, payable on May 22nd to shareholders of record on May 8th. The company has a history of raising its dividend annually for the past 22 years and analysts expect earnings to sufficiently cover future dividend payments. Institutional investors have recently adjusted their holdings in the transportation company.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Reiterates "Market Perform" Rating for Iridium Communications (NASDAQ:IRDM)
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has reaffirmed its "Market Perform" rating for Iridium Communications (NASDAQ:IRDM). This reiteration comes despite Iridium's Q1 results showing an EPS miss, though revenue modestly beat expectations, and management reiterated its 2026 outlook. The stock opened at $40.93, significantly above the consensus price target of $27.60, with a valuation premium indicated by its PE ratio.

feed.title: ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) Announces $1.07 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) declared a quarterly dividend of $1.07 per share, payable on May 15th to shareholders of record by May 4th. The utilities provider has increased its dividend for three consecutive years, with an annualized yield of 4.9% and a payout ratio of 69.6%. Analysts anticipate continued dividend coverage, with expected earnings of $6.19 per share next year.

feed.title: Why Are Stocks at Record Highs with no Iran Resolution?
feed.summary: Despite ongoing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and a naval blockade, global equities, particularly in the U.S. tech sector, have experienced a rapid recovery, with the S&P 500 nearing all-time highs. This swift rebound, faster than historical recoveries, is driven less by a clear resolution to the conflict and more by durable earnings fundamentals. Corporate earnings are consistently beating Wall Street expectations, reinforcing investor confidence in the underlying strength of the market and the tech sector.

feed.title: “Players are frustrated” — Microsoft Gaming has rebranded back to Xbox and promised to adjust its strategy
feed.summary: Microsoft's gaming division, formerly Microsoft Gaming, has reverted to its Xbox branding in an effort to regain trust from gamers and developers. Top executives Asha Sharma and Matt Booty acknowledged past disappointments, primarily slow console feature updates and weak PC presence. The division plans to focus on four directions: hardware, content, user experience, and services, with a new emphasis on "daily active audience" (DAU), development of a new console (Project Helix), increased work with player franchises, service games, and potential acquisitions.

feed.title: Sirius XM Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:SIRI) Declares $0.27 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Sirius XM Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:SIRI) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.27 per share, payable on May 27th to shareholders of record on May 11th. This dividend represents an annualized yield of 3.9% and is supported by a payout ratio of 36.1%, with analysts projecting a future payout ratio of 33.3% based on next year's EPS estimates. The company has raised its dividend for seven consecutive years, and analyst sentiment is currently a "Hold" with an average price target of $26.89.

feed.title: Wheels Up Names Delta CFO Erik Snell to Board, Plans Roger Farah Nomination
feed.summary: Wheels Up Experience Inc. announced significant board changes, appointing Delta Air Lines CFO Erik Snell as a director and planning to nominate retail executive Roger Farah to replace Timothy Armstrong. Snell's return to the board underscores Delta's support for Wheels Up's transformation, while Farah's extensive experience in luxury brands and governance is expected to bolster the company's strategic positioning. These changes aim to strengthen Wheels Up's leadership as it continues its multiyear turnaround effort in private aviation.

feed.title: Transdigm Group Incorporated $TDG Shares Sold by Universal Beteiligungs und Servicegesellschaft mbH
feed.summary: Universal Beteiligungs und Servicegesellschaft mbH reduced its stake in Transdigm Group by 7.8% in Q4, selling 2,296 shares. Institutional investors now own approximately 95.78% of the company, while insiders sold 86,522 shares worth $117.2 million in the last 90 days. Transdigm exceeded Q4 earnings expectations with $8.23 EPS and reported a 13.9% year-over-year revenue increase.

feed.title: How Will Verizon Communications Stock React To Its Upcoming Earnings?
feed.summary: This article analyzes how Verizon Communications (NYSE: VZ) stock might react to its upcoming earnings report on April 27, 2026, by reviewing historical post-earnings stock performance. It examines one-day, five-day, and twenty-one-day returns, identifying patterns and correlations. The analysis also briefly touches on peer performance and introduces the Trefis High Quality Portfolio as a potentially less risky investment strategy.

feed.title: AbbVie Faces FDA Rejection On Manufacturing Issues For Wrinkle Drug
feed.summary: AbbVie received a Complete Response Letter (CRL) from the FDA regarding its wrinkle drug, trenibotulinumtoxinE (TrenibotE), citing manufacturing issues, not safety or efficacy concerns. The company plans to address the feedback promptly and submit a response in the coming months. Amidst this, AbbVie also announced a $1.4 billion investment for a new pharmaceutical manufacturing campus in North Carolina, focusing on advanced technologies for its immunology, neuroscience, and oncology medicines.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR) Plans $0.02 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.02 per share, payable on June 4th to shareholders of record by May 14th. This represents an annualized dividend of $0.08 and a yield of approximately 0.1%, with a low payout ratio of 2.2% indicating strong dividend coverage by earnings. The industrial products company recently surpassed Q1 earnings expectations and provided optimistic FY 2026 guidance, reinforcing its financial stability.

feed.title: Sempra Energy $SRE Stake Raised by Universal Beteiligungs und Servicegesellschaft mbH
feed.summary: Universal Beteiligungs und Servicegesellschaft mbH increased its stake in Sempra Energy by 3.3% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 339,671 shares valued at approximately $30.08 million. Sempra Energy exceeded quarterly EPS estimates but slightly missed on revenue, while also announcing an increased quarterly dividend. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with a target price of $102.67.

feed.title: New data for Smith+Nephew’s CARTIHEAL◊ AGILI-C◊ Cartilage Repair Implant demonstrates superior pain relief and functional gains at 5 years (1)
feed.summary: Smith+Nephew announced new 5-year data from a multicenter, randomized controlled trial for its CARTIHEAL AGILI-C Cartilage Repair Implant, published in the American Journal of Sports Medicine. The data indicates superior pain relief and functional gains compared to standard surgical care, with comparable outcomes for patients with and without osteoarthritis. This implant addresses a critical treatment gap for patients whose cartilage damage is too extensive for standard repair but not severe enough for joint replacement.

feed.summary: Universal Beteiligungs und Servicegesellschaft mbH increased its stake in Corteva, Inc. (NYSE:CTVA) by 8.7% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 586,914 shares valued at $39.36 million. feed.title: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank Decreases Position in Verisk Analytics, Inc. $VRSK

The company also reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $237.20.

feed.title: Universal Beteiligungs und Servicegesellschaft mbH Has $37.96 Million Stock Position in Church & Dwight Co., Inc. $CHD
feed.summary: Universal Beteiligungs und Servicegesellschaft mbH significantly increased its stake in Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) by 27.0% in the fourth quarter, now holding 415,898 shares valued at approximately $37.96 million. feed.title: What Drove GE Vernova’s 2x Surge?
feed.summary: GE Vernova (GEV) stock has nearly doubled in value in the last six months, driven by increased demand for electricity from AI data centers, which has significantly boosted its electrification contracts. The company's substantial and growing backlog of secured contracts, coupled with robust free cash flow and a stable power sector, has instilled investor confidence. While the wind division still faces challenges, management's focus on profitability over growth has been well-received.

feed.title: Amazon to invest up to $25 billion in Anthropic to deepen their AI ties
feed.summary: Amazon is investing an additional $5 billion in AI startup Anthropic, with the potential for $20 billion more, deepening their partnership in the competitive AI industry. Anthropic, known for its Claude chatbot, plans to spend over $100 billion on Amazon's cloud technologies and chips in the next decade. This collaboration provides Amazon's cloud business with a leading AI model and a major customer for its chips, while giving Anthropic access to Amazon's extensive corporate client base.

feed.title: RGTI Stock Pulls Back As Quantum Momentum Cools
feed.summary: Rigetti Computing Inc. (RGTI) stock has pulled back by 7.1% due to bearish analyst outlooks and dilution fears, despite a strong balance sheet with $443.5M in cash. While its revenue is small ($7.1M annually) and losses are significant, the company has a long runway for quantum research. Traders are currently watching whether the stock's mid-teens support level holds, indicating a digestion phase or a deeper pullback if broken.

feed.title: Prologis Announces $1.25 Billion Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Prologis, L.P. announced the pricing of a $1.25 billion senior unsecured notes offering, consisting of $500 million of 4.250% notes due June 15, 2031, and $750 million of 4.900% notes due June 15, 2036. The net proceeds of approximately $1.2 billion are intended for general corporate purposes, including debt repayment. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates PLD as "Outperform" citing strong financials and raised 2026 guidance, though it notes concerns about valuation and 2025 financial quality watch-items.

feed.title: At Huntington Bancshares, the CFO is also the AI strategist
feed.summary: Zachary Wasserman, CFO of Huntington Bancshares, is spearheading the company's AI strategy, rapidly expanding the number of AI agents in production and development. This initiative aims for significant process transformation across various departments, including finance, with a focus on upskilling employees and leveraging AI for complex decision-making. Simultaneously, Huntington Bancshares reported a strong Q1, driven by core commercial and consumer banking, geographic expansion, and successful integrations of recent acquisitions.

feed.title: Halliburton Q1 2026: $5.4B Revenue Holds as Middle East Conflict Dents EPS
feed.summary: Halliburton reported Q1 2026 revenue of $5.4 billion, flat year-over-year, with EPS of $0.55, down 8% due to a $0.02-$0.03 impact from the Middle East conflict. International revenue, particularly Latin America and Europe-Africa, provided a bright spot, while North America and the Middle East/Asia regions saw declines. The company faces margin compression and anticipates continued Middle East conflict impact of $0.07-$0.09 per share in Q2.

feed.title: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank Trims Stock Position in Keysight Technologies Inc. $KEYS
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank significantly reduced its stake in Keysight Technologies Inc. Keysight Technologies is a global provider of electronic design, test, measurement, and optimization solutions.

feed.title: What to Expect From HP Inc.'s Next Quarterly Earnings Report

Analysts project a profit of $0.71 per share, unchanged from the previous year, although HPQ's stock has significantly underperformed major technology indices over the past year. Despite a "Hold" rating from most analysts, the high price target suggests potential upside according to one analyst.
